author: Besting
text: HEADS-UP 2026-06-05 (config/store split, bl-2e26 §15): the 2-hop trail this task closes (landing->origin->central) is DISSOLVED by the revision — federation is now many landings naming ONE store branch (tasks_branch), no transitive discovery. Per instruction this claimed task may land as-is; its trail-loop mechanism is then superseded by the tracker correction bl-cd21 (store-remote sync, not transitive next:).
